# Data Source: okta_app_tokens

Get a list of OAuth2 tokens for an application from Okta.

## Example Usage

{{tffile "/Users/rmcgregor/Development/terraform-provider-okta/examples/data-sources/okta_app_tokens/data-source.tf"}}

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) The ID of the application.

### Read-Only

- `tokens` (List of Object) The list of OAuth2 tokens for the application. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tokens))

<a id="nestedatt--tokens"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tokens`

Read-Only:

- `client_id` (String)
- `created` (String)
- `expires_at` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `issuer` (String)
- `last_updated` (String)
- `scopes` (List of String)
- `status` (String)
- `user_id` (String)
